summary: Project with admin authentication and dashboard management functionality.
architectural_notes: Admin authentication includes first-time registration and subsequent login flows
Admin dashboard is only accessible after successful login

existing_features.title: Implement a first-time admin registration flow: when no admin account exists in the backend, redirect any visit to /admin or /admin/login to /admin/register. The registration page must collect email and password, hash the password with SHA-256, and call the backend's seed/invite admin mutation to create the first admin account. After successful registration, redirect to /admin/login.

Implement the admin login page at /admin/login that supports email/password authentication. On successful credential verification (using SHA-256 password hashing and the backend verifyAuthentication method), persist the admin session to sessionStorage and redirect to /admin/dashboard. Display a clear error message on failed login.

Protect all /admin/* routes with AdminGuard so that only authenticated admins (verified via sessionStorage session) can access the admin dashboard and its sub-pages. Unauthenticated users attempting to access any admin route must be redirected to /admin/login. If no admin exists yet, redirect to /admin/register instead.

Ensure the admin dashboard page at /admin/dashboard is fully accessible and functional after login, displaying all management section links (quotations, projects, content, media, users, etc.) and a working logout button that clears the session and redirects to /admin/login.

new_feature_requests.summary: Admin dashboard with ability to make changes after login
